summary: Iteration 71: Amazon Order Processing via Operations Bot - All features verified. Backend: 19/20 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All flows working correctly - search, CRM status detection, action buttons, SKU mapping warnings, and prepare dispatch compliance checks.
critical_code_review_comments: Universal search correctly checks pending_fulfillment existence instead of relying on crm_status flag
Prepare-dispatch and bot/dispatch endpoints properly search by id, order_id, or amazon_order_id
SKU mapping flow correctly shows 'Map SKU First' button for unmapped items
Frontend OrderBotWidget correctly displays 'In CRM: Yes/No' status
Action buttons correctly show 'Process in CRM' for orders not in CRM and 'Prepare Dispatch' for orders in CRM
Compliance checks properly validate tracking_id, invoice, and label before dispatch
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 71 verified Amazon order processing via Operations Bot. Key features: 1) Universal search at /api/bot/universal-search/{query} correctly checks pending_fulfillment for in_crm status, 2) Orders not in CRM show 'import_to_crm' and 'mark_already_dispatched' actions, 3) Orders in CRM show 'prepare_dispatch' action, 4) Unmapped SKUs trigger 'Map SKU First' button, 5) Prepare dispatch shows compliance requirements (tracking_id, invoice, label). Test orders used: 408-2895822-2737962 (in CRM), 406-5075889-9376350 (not in CRM with unmapped SKU).

universal_search_amazon_order.details: Universal search correctly identifies Amazon orders and checks pending_fulfillment for in_crm status

mfn_order_not_in_crm.details: Orders not in CRM show 'Process in CRM' and 'Already Dispatched' buttons

mfn_order_in_crm.details: Orders in CRM show 'Prepare Dispatch' button with compliance checks

sku_mapping_flow.details: Unmapped SKUs show warning and 'Map SKU First' button before processing

prepare_dispatch_amazon_order_id.details: Prepare dispatch endpoint accepts amazon_order_id lookup

bot_dispatch_amazon_order_id.details: Bot dispatch endpoint accepts amazon_order_id lookup

import_amazon_to_crm.details: Import amazon order to CRM endpoint exists and validates input

mark_amazon_dispatched.details: Mark amazon dispatched endpoint exists and validates input
